Contracts

Settings
Timezone
Sets the timezone for your calendar, booking availability, and client-facing scheduling. All appointment times display in this timezone.
Business Hours
Blackout Dates
Block bookings on holidays or other closed days. Applies to all booking widgets and disables online booking for these dates.
Contact Tags
Square Integration
Connect your Square account via OAuth. Your app secret stays on the server. Nothing sensitive is stored in the browser.

You will be redirected to Square to authorize access.
Custom Fields
Create reusable custom fields. They appear in form builders and in expandable sections on contact records. Organize them by category.
